description: Metal3DataTemplate is the Schema for the metal3datatemplates API.

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: spec defines the desired state of Metal3DataTemplate.

clusterName.description: clusterName is the name of the Cluster this object belongs to.

metaData.description: metaData contains the information needed to generate the metadata secret

dnsServersFromPool.description: dnsServersFromPool is the list of metadata items to be rendered as dns servers.

apiGroup.description: apiGroup is the api group of the IP pool.

key.description: key will be used as the key to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

kind.description: kind is the kind of the IP pool

name.description: name is the name of the IP pool used to fetch the value to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

fromAnnotations.description:
fromAnnotations is the list of metadata items to be fetched from object
Annotations

items.description:
MetaDataFromAnnotation contains the information to fetch an annotation
content, if the label does not exist, it is rendered as empty string.

annotation.description: annotation is the key of the annotation to fetch

key.description: key will be used as the key to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

object.description: object is the type of the object from which we retrieve the name

fromHostInterfaces.description:
fromHostInterfaces is the list of metadata items to be rendered as MAC
addresses of the host interfaces.

items.description: MetaDataHostInterface contains the information to render the object name.

fromBootMAC.description: fromBootMAC will fetch the MAC address from the BareMetalHost Spec BootMACAddress field.

interface.description:
interface is the name of the interface in the BareMetalHost Status Hardware
Details list of interfaces from which to fetch the MAC address.

key.description: key will be used as the key to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

fromLabels.description: fromLabels is the list of metadata items to be fetched from object labels

items.description:
MetaDataFromLabel contains the information to fetch a label content, if the
label does not exist, it is rendered as empty string.

key.description: key will be used as the key to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

label.description: label is the key of the label to fetch

object.description: object is the type of the object from which we retrieve the name

gatewaysFromPool.description: gatewaysFromPool is the list of metadata items to be rendered as gateway addresses.

apiGroup.description: apiGroup is the api group of the IP pool.

key.description: key will be used as the key to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

kind.description: kind is the kind of the IP pool

name.description: name is the name of the IP pool used to fetch the value to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

indexes.description:
indexes is the list of metadata items to be rendered from the index of the
Metal3Data

items.description: MetaDataIndex contains the information to render the index.

key.description: key will be used as the key to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

offset.description: offset is the offset to apply to the index when rendering it

step.description: step is the multiplier of the index

ipAddressesFromPool.description: ipAddressesFromPool is the list of metadata items to be rendered as ip addresses.

apiGroup.description: apiGroup is the api group of the IP pool.

key.description: key will be used as the key to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

kind.description: kind is the kind of the IP pool

name.description: name is the name of the IP pool used to fetch the value to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

namespaces.description: namespaces is the list of metadata items to be rendered from the namespace

items.description: MetaDataNamespace contains the information to render the namespace.

key.description: key will be used as the key to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

objectNames.description:
objectNames is the list of metadata items to be rendered from the name
of objects.

items.description: MetaDataObjectName contains the information to render the object name.

key.description: key will be used as the key to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

object.description: object is the type of the object from which we retrieve the name

prefixesFromPool.description: prefixesFromPool is the list of metadata items to be rendered as network prefixes.

apiGroup.description: apiGroup is the api group of the IP pool.

key.description: key will be used as the key to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

kind.description: kind is the kind of the IP pool

name.description: name is the name of the IP pool used to fetch the value to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

strings.description: strings is the list of metadata items to be rendered from strings

items.description: MetaDataString contains the information to render the string.

key.description: key will be used as the key to set in the metadata map for cloud-init

value.description: value is the string to render.

networkData.description:
networkData contains the information needed to generate the networkdata
secret

links.description: links is a structure containing lists of different types objects

bonds.description: bonds contains a list of Bond links

items.description: NetworkDataLinkBond represents a bond link object.

bondLinks.description: bondLinks is the list of links that are part of the bond.

bondMode.description:
bondMode is the mode of bond used. It can be one of
balance-rr, active-backup, balance-xor, broadcast, balance-tlb, balance-alb, 802.3ad

bondXmitHashPolicy.description: bondXmitHashPolicy selects the transmit hash policy used for port selection in balance-xor and 802.3ad modes

id.description: id is the ID of the interface (used for naming)

macAddress.description:
macAddress is the MAC address of the interface, containing the object
used to render it.

fromAnnotation.description:
fromAnnotation references an object annotation to retrieve the
MAC address from

annotation.description: annotation is the key of the annotation to fetch

object.description: object is the type of the object from which we retrieve the name

fromHostInterface.description:
fromHostInterface contains the name of the interface in the BareMetalHost
Introspection details from which to fetch the MAC address

string.description: string contains the MAC address given as a string

mtu.description: mtu is the MTU of the interface

name.description:
name is the interface name to be used by cloud-init. When combined with
macAddress, cloud-init will rename the interface matching the MAC to this name.
When macAddress is omitted, cloud-init will use this name directly.

parameters.description: parameters blob passed without any validation/modifications into cloud-init config

items.description: NetworkDataLinkBondParam represents a single bond parameter.

ethernets.description: ethernets contains a list of Ethernet links

items.description: NetworkDataLinkEthernet represents an ethernet link object.

id.description: id is the ID of the interface (used for naming)

macAddress.description:

used to render it.

fromAnnotation references an object annotation to retrieve the
MAC address from

Introspection details from which to fetch the MAC address

mtu.description: mtu is the MTU of the interface

name.description:
name is the interface name to be used by cloud-init. When combined with
MACAddress, cloud-init will rename the interface matching the MAC to this name.
When MACAddress is omitted, cloud-init will use this name directly.

type.description:
type is the type of the ethernet link. It can be one of:
bridge, dvs, hw_veb, hyperv, ovs, tap, vhostuser, vif, phy

vlans.description: vlans contains a list of Vlan links

networks.description: networks  is a structure containing lists of different types objects

ipv4.description: ipv4 contains a list of IPv4 static allocations

items.description: NetworkDataIPv4 represents an ipv4 static network object.

fromPoolAnnotation.description:
fromPoolAnnotation allows specifying the pool reference via an annotation on
a Machine, Metal3Machine, or BareMetalHost object.
When set, ipAddressFromIPPool and fromPoolRef are ignored.

annotation.description:
annotation is the key of the annotation that contains the pool name.
The annotation value should be a string containing the pool name.

object.description: object is the type of the object from which we retrieve the annotation

fromPoolRef.description: fromPoolRef is a reference to a IP pool to allocate an address from.

apiGroup.description:
apiGroup of the IPPool.
apiGroup must be fully qualified domain name.

kind.description:
kind of the IPPool.
kind must consist of alphanumeric characters or '-', start with an alphabetic character, and end with an alphanumeric character.

name.description:
name of the IPPool.
name must consist of lower case alphanumeric characters, '-' or '.', and must start and end with an alphanumeric character.

ipAddressFromIPPool.description: ipAddressFromIPPool contains the name of the IP pool to use to get an ip address

link.description: link is the link on which the network applies

routes.description: routes contains a list of IPv4 routes

items.description: NetworkDataRoutev4 represents an ipv4 route object.

gateway.description: gateway is the IPv4 address of the gateway

fromIPPool.description: fromIPPool is the name of the IPPool to fetch the gateway from

status.description: status defines the observed state of Metal3DataTemplate.
